changes: release packaging cleaned for fresh install (no installed lock, no recovery artifacts, no bundled sqlite runtime db)
standalone zip output moved to repository root release folder
github README refreshed with badges, php prerequisites and release commands
standalone zip packaging finalization with root entry files, release docs and verified build artifacts
release scripts improved with manifest generation and robust package verification checks
ui/feature pre-lock review completed with targeted cta and safety confirmations fixes
strict route resolution with zone separation and admin custom path safety
module routes loading conventions with manifest guards and conflict checks
routing exceptions + URL generator + route helpers integrated into core router facade
standalone boot system entrypoints via core/env|config|security|boot|router
core install-lock guard supports storage/install.lock and storage/install/installed.lock
global security bootstrap now applies baseline headers and request input sanitation
